rounds.prompt: How many times more people live in China than in the United Kingdom?
rounds.fact: The UK has ~67 million people; China has ~1.4 billion — about 21× more. China alone has more people than every country in Europe combined.

rounds.prompt: How many times more trees are there on Earth than stars in the Milky Way?
rounds.fact: The Milky Way has ~300 billion stars; Earth has ~3 trillion trees — 10× more trees than stars in our galaxy.

rounds.prompt: How many times more bacteria live in your gut than cells in your body?
rounds.fact: Your body has ~30 trillion human cells and ~38 trillion bacteria — about 1.3× more bacteria. You are, in a sense, more microbe than human.

rounds.prompt: How many times more ants than humans are there on Earth?
rounds.fact: There are ~8 billion humans; there are an estimated ~20 quadrillion ants — about 2.5 million ants for every person on Earth.

rounds.prompt: How many times more species of insects are there than mammals?
rounds.fact: There are ~6,400 known mammal species; there are ~1 million known insect species — 156× more. And millions of insect species are likely still undiscovered.
